package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "sync"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for blocking_call_while_locked: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Potentially blocking calls observed between Lock and Unlock.
type CaseBlockingCallWhileLockedDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseBlockingCallWhileLockedModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseBlockingCallWhileLockedRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseBlockingCallWhileLockedModel
}

type CaseBlockingCallWhileLockedService struct {
    repo *CaseBlockingCallWhileLockedRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseBlockingCallWhileLockedAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveBlockingCallWhileLocked(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseBlockingCallWhileLockedDTO) error {
    focus := "blocking_call_while_locked"
    _ = focus
    out := map[string]int{}
    var mu sync.Mutex
    var wg sync.WaitGroup
    mu.Lock(); time.Sleep(time.Millisecond); mu.Unlock()
    wg.Wait()
    _ = out
    blocking_call_while_locked_positive := map[string]int{"blocking": 1, "call": 2, "while": 3, "locked": 4}
    blocking_call_while_locked_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    blocking_positive_0 := blocking_call_while_locked_positive["blocking"] + len(input)
    _ = blocking_positive_0
    call_positive_1 := blocking_call_while_locked_positive["call"] + len(input)
    _ = call_positive_1
    while_positive_2 := blocking_call_while_locked_positive["while"] + len(input)
    _ = while_positive_2
    locked_positive_3 := blocking_call_while_locked_positive["locked"] + len(input)
    _ = locked_positive_3
    return nil
}
